_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — deploy academy to platform-services cluster
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: build-managers' -d @applications/academy.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/applications
name: academy
values_yaml:
expose:
  hostname: academy.podzone.cloud
  gatewayName: gateway
  gatewayNamespace: kube-system
keycloak:
  url: https://auth.podzone.cloud
  realm: podzone
  clientId: academy
qdrant:
  url: http://qdrant.agentsonly.svc.cluster.local:6333
postgres:
  host: cloudnativepg.platform-services.svc.cluster.local
  database: academy
  credentialsSecret: academy-postgres-credentials
tutor:
  ollama:
    enabled: true
    endpoint: http://ollama.agentsonly.svc.cluster.local:11434
    model: llama3.2:1b
  claude:
    enabled: false
  freeTier:
    sessionLimitEnabled: false
    sessionLimitValue: 25
    sessionLimitUnit: turns
